<script setup lang="ts">
import {
  Button,
  ControlledCheckbox,
  ControlledInput,
  ControlledRadioGroup,
  ControlledTextarea,
  Form,
  FormActions,
  FormFields
} from "elements";
import {
  registrationSchema,
  RegistrationFormValues,
  registrationInitialValues
} from "@/registration/types";

const roleOptions = [
  { value: "user", label: "Utente" },
  { value: "admin", label: "Amministratore" },
  { value: "contributor", label: "Contributore" }
];

const frequencyOptions = [
  { value: "daily", label: "Giornaliero" },
  { value: "weekly", label: "Settimanale" },
  { value: "monthly", label: "Mensile" }
];

const actions = {
  onSubmit: async (values: RegistrationFormValues) => values
};
</script>

<template>
  <Form
    :initial-values="registrationInitialValues"
    :form-schema="registrationSchema"
    :actions="actions"
  >

    <FormFields v-slot="{ form, resetGeneralError }">
      <!-- Username -->
      <ControlledInput
        name="username"
        label="Username"
        placeholder="Almeno 3 caratteri"
        type="text"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Email -->
      <ControlledInput
        name="email"
        label="Email"
        type="email"
        placeholder="nome@esempio.com"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Role -->
      <ControlledRadioGroup
        name="role"
        label="Ruolo"
        :options="roleOptions"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Other Info (conditional) -->
      <ControlledInput
        v-if="form.values.role === "contributor""
        name="otherInfo"
        label="Descrizione del contributo"
        placeholder="Spiega cosa ti puoi offrire"
        type="text"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Newsletter -->
      <ControlledCheckbox
        name="newsletter"
        label="Iscriviti alla newsletter"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Frequency (conditional) -->
      <ControlledRadioGroup
        v-if="form.values.newsletter"
        name="frequency"
        label="Frequenza"
        :options="frequencyOptions"
        orientation="horizontal"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Bio (optional) -->
      <ControlledTextarea
        name="bio"
        label="Biografia"
        placeholder="Scrivi qualcosa di te..."
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
    </FormFields>

    <FormActions v-slot="{ form, isValid }">
      <Button
        type="submit"
        class="w-full"
        :disabled="!isValid || form?.isSubmitting.value"
      >
        Registrati
      </Button>
    </FormActions>
  </Form>
</template>

runs.output_code:
<script setup lang="ts">
import { 
  Button, 
  ControlledCheckbox, 
  ControlledInput, 
  ControlledRadioGroup, 
  ControlledTextarea, 
  Form, 
  FormActions, 
  FormFields, 
} from "elements";
import { z } from "zod";

const registrationSchema = z.object({
  username: z.string().min(3, "Username: almeno 3 caratteri"),
  email: z.string().email("Email non valida").min(1, "Email obbligatoria"),
  role: z.enum(["user", "admin", "contributor"]),
  otherInfo: z.string().optional(),
  newsletter: z.boolean().optional(),
  frequency: z.enum(["daily", "weekly", "monthly"]).optional(),
  bio: z.string().optional(),
})
.superRefine((data, ctx) => {
  if (data.role === "contributor" && !data.otherInfo) {
    ctx.addIssue({
      code: z.ZodIssueCode.custom,
      message: "Descrivi il tuo contributo",
      path: ["otherInfo"],
    });
  }

  if (data.newsletter && !data.frequency) {
    ctx.addIssue({
      code: z.ZodIssueCode.custom,
      message: "Seleziona una frequenza",
      path: ["frequency"],
    });
  }
});

type RegistrationFormValues = z.infer<typeof registrationSchema>;

const initialValues: RegistrationFormValues = {
  username: "",
  email: "",
  role: "user",
  otherInfo: "",
  newsletter: false,
  frequency: undefined,
  bio: "",
};

const actions = {
  onSubmit: async (values: RegistrationFormValues) => {
    console.log("submitted:", values);
    return values;
  },
};

const roleOptions = [
  { value: "user", label: "Utente" },
  { value: "admin", label: "Amministratore" },
  { value: "contributor", label: "Contributore" },
];

const frequencyOptions = [
  { value: "daily", label: "Quotidiano" },
  { value: "weekly", label: "Settimanalmente" },
  { value: "monthly", label: "Mensilmente" },
];
</script>

<template>
  <Form :initial-values="initialValues" :form-schema="registrationSchema" :actions="actions">

    <FormFields v-slot="{ form, resetGeneralError }">
      <ControlledInput
        name="username"
        label="Username"
        placeholder="il tuo username"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledInput
        name="email"
        label="Email"
        type="email"
        placeholder="nome@esempio.com"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledRadioGroup
        name="role"
        label="Ruolo"
        :options="roleOptions"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledInput
        v-if="form.values.role === 'contributor'"
        name="otherInfo"
        label="Altre informazioni"
        placeholder="Descrivi il tuo contributo"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledCheckbox
        name="newsletter"
        label="Iscrivimi alla newsletter"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledRadioGroup
        v-if="form.values.newsletter"
        name="frequency"
        label="Frequenza"
        :options="frequencyOptions"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledTextarea
        name="bio"
        label="Biografia"
        placeholder="Raccontaci qualcosa di te..."
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
    </FormFields>

    <FormActions v-slot="{ form, isValid }" class="mt-6">
      <Button
        type="submit"
        class="w-full"
        :disabled="!isValid || form?.isSubmitting.value"
      >
        Invia
      </Button>
    </FormActions>

  </Form>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { \n  Button, \n  ControlledCheckbox, \n  ControlledInput, \n  ControlledRadioGroup, \n  ControlledTextarea, \n  Form, \n  FormActions, \n  FormFields, \n} from "elements";
import { z } from "zod";

const registrationSchema = z.object({
  username: z.string().min(3, "Username: almeno 3 caratteri"),
  email: z.string().email("Email non valida").min(1, "Email obbligatoria"),
  role: z.enum(["user", "admin", "contributor"]),
  otherInfo: z.string().optional(),
  newsletter: z.boolean().optional(),
  frequency: z.enum(["daily", "weekly", "monthly"]).optional(),
  bio: z.string().optional(),
})
.superRefine((data, ctx) => {
  if (data.role === "contributor" && !data.otherInfo) {
    ctx.addIssue({
      code: z.ZodIssueCode.custom,
      message: "Descrivi il tuo contributo",
      path: ["otherInfo"],
    });
  }

  if (data.newsletter && !data.frequency) {
    ctx.addIssue({
      code: z.ZodIssueCode.custom,
      message: "Seleziona una frequenza",
      path: ["frequency"],
    });
  }
});

type RegistrationFormValues = z.infer<typeof registrationSchema>;

const initialValues: RegistrationFormValues = {
  username: "",
  email: "",
  role: "user",
  otherInfo: "",
  newsletter: false,
  frequency: undefined,
  bio: "",
};

const actions = {
  onSubmit: async (values: RegistrationFormValues) => {
    console.log("submitted:", values);
    return values;
  },
};

const roleOptions = [
  { value: "user", label: "Utente" },
  { value: "admin", label: "Amministratore" },
  { value: "contributor", label: "Contributore" },
];

const frequencyOptions = [
  { value: "daily", label: "Quotidiano" },
  { value: "weekly", label: "Settimanalmente" },
  { value: "monthly", label: "Mensilmente" },
];
</script>

<template>
  <Form :initial-values="initialValues" :form-schema="registrationSchema" :actions="actions">

    <FormFields v-slot="{ form, resetGeneralError }">
      <ControlledInput
        name="username"
        label="Username"
        placeholder="il tuo username"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledInput
        name="email"
        label="Email"
        type="email"
        placeholder="nome@esempio.com"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledRadioGroup
        name="role"
        label="Ruolo"
        :options="roleOptions"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledInput
        v-if="form.values.role === 'contributor'"
        name="otherInfo"
        label="Altre informazioni"
        placeholder="Descrivi il tuo contributo"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledCheckbox
        name="newsletter"
        label="Iscrivimi alla newsletter"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledRadioGroup
        v-if="form.values.newsletter"
        name="frequency"
        label="Frequenza"
        :options="frequencyOptions"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledTextarea
        name="bio"
        label="Biografia"
        placeholder="Raccontaci qualcosa di te..."
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
    </FormFields>

    <FormActions v-slot="{ form, isValid }" class="mt-6">
      <Button
        type="submit"
        class="w-full"
        :disabled="!isValid || form?.isSubmitting.value"
      >
        Invia
      </Button>
    </FormActions>

  </Form>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { Button, ControlledCheckbox, ControlledInput, ControlledRadioGroup, ControlledTextarea, Form, FormActions, FormFields } from "elements";
import { z } from "zod";

const schema = z.object({
  username: z.string().min(3, "Username: almeno 3 caratteri"),
  email: z.string().email("Email non valida").min(1, "Email obbligatoria"),
  role: z.enum(["user", "admin", "contributor"]),
  otherInfo: z.string().optional(),
  newsletter: z.boolean().optional(),
  frequency: z.enum(["daily", "weekly", "monthly"]).optional(),
  bio: z.string().optional(),
})
.superRefine((data, ctx) => {
  if (data.role === "contributor" && !data.otherInfo) {
    ctx.addIssue({
      code: z.ZodIssueCode.custom,
      message: "Descrivi il tuo contributo",
      path: ["otherInfo"],
    });
  }

  if (data.newsletter && !data.frequency) {
    ctx.addIssue({
      code: z.ZodIssueCode.custom,
      message: "Seleziona una frequenza",
      path: ["frequency"],
    });
  }
});

type FormValues = z.infer<typeof schema>;

const initialValues: FormValues = {
  username: "",
  email: "",
  role: "user",
  otherInfo: "",
  newsletter: false,
  frequency: undefined,
  bio: "",
};

const roleOptions = [
  { value: "user", label: "Utente" },
  { value: "admin", label: "Amministratore" },
  { value: "contributor", label: "Contributore" },
];

const frequencyOptions = [
  { value: "daily", label: "Quotidiano" },
  { value: "weekly", label: "Settimanale" },
  { value: "monthly", label: "Mensile" },
];

const actions = {
  onSubmit: async (values: FormValues) => values,
};
</script>

<template>
  <Form :initial-values="initialValues" :form-schema="schema" :actions="actions">

    <FormFields v-slot="{ form, resetGeneralError }">
      <ControlledInput name="username" label="Username" placeholder="Inserisci username" @input-click="resetGeneralError" />
      <ControlledInput name="email" label="Email" type="email" placeholder="nome@esempio.com" @input-click="resetGeneralError" />
      <ControlledRadioGroup name="role" label="Ruolo" :options="roleOptions" @input-click="resetGeneralError" />
      <ControlledInput v-if="form.values.role === 'contributor'" name="otherInfo" label="Informazioni sul contributo" placeholder="Descrivi il tuo contributo" @input-click="resetGeneralError" />
      <ControlledCheckbox name="newsletter" label="Iscrivimi alla newsletter" @input-click="resetGeneralError" />
      <ControlledRadioGroup v-if="form.values.newsletter" name="frequency" label="Frequenza" :options="frequencyOptions" @input-click="resetGeneralError" />
      <ControlledTextarea name="bio" label="Biografia" placeholder="Raccontaci qualcosa di te..." @input-click="resetGeneralError" />
    </FormFields>

    <FormActions v-slot="{ form, isValid }" class="mt-6">
      <Button type="submit" class="w-full" :disabled="!isValid || form?.isSubmitting.value">
        Registrati
      </Button>
    </FormActions>

  </Form>
</template>

args.content:
<script setup lang="ts">
import { Button, ControlledCheckbox, ControlledInput, ControlledRadioGroup, ControlledTextarea, Form, FormActions, FormFields } from "elements";
import { z } from "zod";

const schema = z.object({
  username: z.string().min(3, "Username: almeno 3 caratteri"),
  email: z.string().email("Email non valida").min(1, "Email obbligatoria"),
  role: z.enum(["user", "admin", "contributor"]),
  otherInfo: z.string().optional(),
  newsletter: z.boolean().optional(),
  frequency: z.enum(["daily", "weekly", "monthly"]).optional(),
  bio: z.string().optional(),
})
.superRefine((data, ctx) => {
  if (data.role === "contributor" && !data.otherInfo) {
    ctx.addIssue({
      code: z.ZodIssueCode.custom,
      message: "Descrivi il tuo contributo",
      path: ["otherInfo"],
    });
  }

  if (data.newsletter && !data.frequency) {
    ctx.addIssue({
      code: z.ZodIssueCode.custom,
      message: "Seleziona una frequenza",
      path: ["frequency"],
    });
  }
});

type FormValues = z.infer<typeof schema>;

const initialValues: FormValues = {
  username: "",
  email: "",
  role: "user",
  otherInfo: "",
  newsletter: false,
  frequency: undefined,
  bio: "",
};

const roleOptions = [
  { value: "user", label: "Utente" },
  { value: "admin", label: "Amministratore" },
  { value: "contributor", label: "Contributore" },
];

const frequencyOptions = [
  { value: "daily", label: "Quotidiano" },
  { value: "weekly", label: "Settimanale" },
  { value: "monthly", label: "Mensile" },
];

const actions = {
  onSubmit: async (values: FormValues) => values,
};
</script>

<template>
  <Form :initial-values="initialValues" :form-schema="schema" :actions="actions">

    <FormFields v-slot="{ form, resetGeneralError }">
      <ControlledInput name="username" label="Username" placeholder="Inserisci username" @input-click="resetGeneralError" />
      <ControlledInput name="email" label="Email" type="email" placeholder="nome@esempio.com" @input-click="resetGeneralError" />
      <ControlledRadioGroup name="role" label="Ruolo" :options="roleOptions" @input-click="resetGeneralError" />
      <ControlledInput v-if="form.values.role === 'contributor'" name="otherInfo" label="Informazioni sul contributo" placeholder="Descrivi il tuo contributo" @input-click="resetGeneralError" />
      <ControlledCheckbox name="newsletter" label="Iscrivimi alla newsletter" @input-click="resetGeneralError" />
      <ControlledRadioGroup v-if="form.values.newsletter" name="frequency" label="Frequenza" :options="frequencyOptions" @input-click="resetGeneralError" />
      <ControlledTextarea name="bio" label="Biografia" placeholder="Raccontaci qualcosa di te..." @input-click="resetGeneralError" />
    </FormFields>

    <FormActions v-slot="{ form, isValid }" class="mt-6">
      <Button type="submit" class="w-full" :disabled="!isValid || form?.isSubmitting.value">
        Registrati
      </Button>
    </FormActions>

  </Form>
</template>
